reasoning: The primary limiter is your lactate clearance and aerobic base. Your last ride indicates recovery, and we want to improve your ability to sustain higher power over time. This workout is designed to simulate the efforts required on the Alpine Loop, particularly the sustained 8.5-mile climb with variable intensity efforts to mimic the undulating terrain.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets of 7-min over-unders: 3 min at 201-218W, 2 min at 242-256W, 2 min at 201-218W. Rest 2 min between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
